title: The Big Healthcare Bill
briefing: Your signature healthcare package finally hits the floor, but it's twenty votes short and the price tag keeps ballooning. You can ram through a sweeping universal plan that delights reformers and terrifies the bond market, or gut it down to a modest fix everyone can swallow. The clock is running and the cameras are on.

choices.label: Push the sweeping universal plan
choices.detail: Spend the capital, swing for the fences.
choices.result: The bill squeaks through after an all-night session. Supporters call it historic; markets wobble at the cost and the deficit hawks circle.

news.headline: A landmark guarantee of care for every citizen
Reckless spending bill will crush the budget
Sweeping health law passes after marathon vote
POTUS GAMBLES IT ALL on MEGA-HEALTH BILL 😱💸

social.text: we actually did it. people won't go bankrupt getting sick anymore. crying.
who is paying for this? oh right, all of us. forever.

choices.advisor: Historic on paper, but the markets and the deficit hawks will hammer you for months.

choices.label: Pass a modest bipartisan fix
choices.detail: Trim it down, get something signed.
choices.result: The slimmed-down bill passes with votes from both aisles. Pragmatists nod; your base mutters that you flinched.

news.headline: Scaled-back health reform clears with bipartisan support
A sensible, affordable patch to the system
Half a loaf when millions needed the whole thing
POTUS PLAYS IT SAFE — base feeling BETRAYED 😤

social.text: not glamorous but it'll actually help people next month. i'll take it.

choices.advisor: Durable and cheap. Just brace for the 'you had the votes and choked' chorus.

choices.label: Shelve it for now
choices.result: You pull the bill before it can fail. The town breathes easier; your allies feel abandoned and the headline writes itself.

news.headline: President abandons reform; advocates feel betrayed
A rare outbreak of fiscal sanity
Healthcare overhaul shelved amid vote shortfall
POTUS PULLS THE PLUG on signature bill 🚑❌

social.text: campaigned on this for two years. shelved it in two weeks. cool.

choices.advisor: Saves face today, costs you a promise. Voters remember the ones you walk away from.

title: After the Tragedy
briefing: A mass shooting has shattered a small town and the nation is grieving and furious in equal measure. Reformers demand sweeping new restrictions; rights groups warn you not to exploit a tragedy. Whatever you say in the next hour gets played on every screen in the country.

choices.label: Push sweeping new restrictions
choices.result: You go to the podium and demand action. Half the country cheers, the other half mobilizes overnight, and the capital braces for a brawl.

news.headline: President answers grief with courage and action
Exploiting tragedy to trample basic rights
President calls for sweeping new restrictions
POTUS GOES NUCLEAR after horror — nation SPLITS 💥

social.text: finally someone saying what we've all been screaming for years.
using tragedy as a prop. shameful.

choices.advisor: Moral high ground with half the country. The other half just found its rallying cry.

choices.label: Propose a narrow, targeted measure
choices.result: You offer a modest, focused proposal. It pleases almost nobody fully but draws quiet support from the exhausted middle.

news.headline: President threads the needle with narrow proposal
A measured response that respects the Constitution
Too timid for a moment that demanded more
POTUS picks the SAFE LANE — internet UNDERWHELMED 😐

social.text: not everything, but a real step that might actually pass. good.

choices.advisor: Lowest-temperature option in the room. Both flanks will call you a coward; the middle won't.

choices.label: Lead the mourning, defer policy
choices.result: You visit the town, hold the families, and decline to legislate from grief. Critics on every side accuse you of dodging.

news.headline: President consoles town, holds off on policy
Thoughts and prayers, and nothing else
President resists the rush to legislate
POTUS HUGS, DUCKS THE FIGHT — fury MOUNTS 😡

social.text: another vigil, another nothing. how many more times.

choices.advisor: Calms the nation today and gives both flanks a stick to beat you with tomorrow.

title: Pressure at the Border
briefing: Crossings have surged to record numbers and the southern facilities are overwhelmed and on every front page. Hardliners want a sweeping crackdown; humanitarian groups warn of a moral catastrophe. The governors are calling and they are not happy.

choices.label: Order a hard-line crackdown
choices.result: You flood the border with enforcement and the numbers drop fast. Order-and-security voters cheer; allies abroad and rights groups recoil.

news.headline: President finally restores order at the border
A cruel crackdown that abandons our values
President orders sweeping border enforcement surge
POTUS SLAMS THE DOOR — numbers PLUMMET overnight 🚧

social.text: took long enough. a country with no borders is no country.
these are families fleeing for their lives. this is who we are now?

choices.advisor: Plays great at home, badly abroad. Our partners read this as a values retreat.

choices.label: Pitch a comprehensive overhaul
choices.detail: Enforcement plus a path and more judges.
choices.result: You unveil a sweeping deal pairing enforcement with legal pathways. The grand bargain wins praise abroad and instant suspicion from both flanks at home.

news.headline: President unveils comprehensive immigration framework
A humane, durable plan worth fighting for
Amnesty by another name, dressed up as reform
POTUS DROPS GIANT IMMIGRATION DEAL — both sides FUMING 🌎

social.text: an actual plan instead of a slogan. shocking. i'm into it.

choices.advisor: The legacy play. It earns goodwill abroad and a two-front fight in the capital.

choices.label: Let the states and courts manage it
choices.result: You hand the problem to the governors with a check and a shrug. They feud, the courts dither, and the crisis simply keeps simmering on the news.

news.headline: President passes the buck on the border
Federal silence leaves migrants in limbo
White House defers border response to states
POTUS SHRUGS, hands HOT POTATO to governors 🥔

social.text: the buck stops... somewhere else apparently. great leadership.

choices.advisor: Keeps your fingerprints off it, which is exactly what voters will hold against you.

title: A Seat on the High Court
briefing: A justice retires, handing you a generational pick that will outlast your presidency by decades. Choose a fiery ideologue who thrills your base, or a moderate who could actually get confirmed without a war. The Senate is already sharpening its knives.

choices.label: Nominate a bold ideological pick
choices.result: Your base erupts in celebration as the capital descends into a bruising, weeks-long confirmation brawl.

news.headline: A historic, principled nominee for the Court
An extreme pick that will divide the nation
President names polarizing nominee; fight looms
POTUS drops a BOMBSHELL pick — SENATE in MELTDOWN ⚖️🔥

social.text: FINALLY a nominee who won't cave. let's go.

choices.advisor: Energizes the faithful, torches the middle. This confirmation will eat months.

choices.label: Pick a confirmable moderate
choices.result: The nominee sails through on a bipartisan vote. The establishment exhales; your base grumbles about a missed chance.

news.headline: Consensus nominee confirmed with rare bipartisan support
A safe pick when the moment called for more
President blinks, picks a forgettable moderate
POTUS plays it SAFE — base SNOOZING 😴

social.text: a confirmable nominee in this climate? miracle.

choices.advisor: Drama-free and durable. Just absorb the 'you wasted it' grumbling.

title: Roads, Rails, and Reckoning
briefing: A bridge collapse has put crumbling infrastructure back in the headlines, and your team has a trillion-dollar rebuild plan ready to go. You can swing for a massive, debt-funded package or a leaner one that pays for itself with new fees. The hard hats are watching, and so are the bond traders.

choices.label: Launch the trillion-dollar rebuild
choices.result: Ground breaks coast to coast and the job numbers tick up immediately. The deficit hawks scream, but the cranes are already in the sky.

news.headline: Historic infrastructure package launches nationwide builds
A generational investment in jobs and communities
Trillion-dollar spending spree mortgages our future
POTUS goes BUILD-MODE — CRANES EVERYWHERE 🏗️🇺🇸

social.text: my whole local just got two years of work. thank you.
love the bridges, hate the bill our grandkids inherit.

choices.advisor: Huge popularity and real jobs, but the debt becomes a permanent target on your back.

choices.label: Pass a leaner, self-funded plan
choices.detail: User fees and tolls cover the cost.
choices.result: A disciplined, paid-for package clears with broad support. Fiscal types applaud; commuters grumble about the new tolls.

news.headline: A responsible, fully-funded path to better roads
Modest infrastructure bill clears with bipartisan votes
Tolls on working families to fund the basics
POTUS fixes roads — but YOUR commute just got PRICIER 💰🛣️

social.text: fixing things without lighting money on fire? more of this please.

choices.advisor: Clean and defensible. Just know every toll booth becomes a small attack ad.

title: The Student Debt Question
briefing: A mountain of student debt is crushing a generation, and millions are begging you to cancel it with a stroke of your pen. Critics call it a giveaway to the well-off that punishes those who paid. Your lawyers say you can probably do it; your economists say be careful.

choices.label: Cancel debt by executive order
choices.result: Millions wake up to lighter balances and your approval among younger voters spikes. The courts and the deficit hawks immediately come knocking.

news.headline: A lifeline for a generation drowning in debt
A handout that betrays everyone who paid their way
President cancels swaths of student debt by order
POTUS WIPES THE DEBT — group chats EXPLODING 🎉📚

social.text: i just refreshed my account and cried at my desk. life-changing.
worked two jobs to pay mine off. cool to know that was for nothing.

choices.advisor: Electric with the young and the indebted. Expect lawsuits and a 'who pays?' firestorm.

choices.label: Offer targeted, means-tested relief
choices.detail: Help the strugglers, spare the courts.
choices.result: You aim relief at low-income borrowers and public servants. It's quieter and survives legal scrutiny, but the headlines are muted.

news.headline: President targets debt relief at neediest borrowers
A restrained approach that respects taxpayers
Help for some, while millions are left waiting
POTUS hands out RELIEF — but did YOU make the cut? 🤔

social.text: ten years of public service finally counted for something. grateful.

choices.advisor: Legally bulletproof and fiscally modest. It just won't trend the way the big version would.

choices.label: Reform the system, cancel nothing
choices.detail: Cap rates, fix loans, no forgiveness.
choices.result: You overhaul interest rates and repayment rules instead of erasing balances. Wonks approve; borrowers expecting relief feel cheated.

news.headline: President fixes the pipes instead of mopping the floor
Tinkering with the system while debtors suffer now
White House overhauls loan terms, skips forgiveness
POTUS says NO to canceling debt — borrowers RAGING 😤

social.text: lower rates? cute. i needed the balance gone, not a coupon.

choices.advisor: Smart long-term policy that feels like a betrayal to anyone who wanted a number to drop.

title: A City on Edge
briefing: Violent crime is spiking in major cities and the nightly news leads with it every single night. One camp demands a flood of federal police and tougher sentences; another insists the answer is jobs, housing, and community programs. The mayors want money and they want it now.

choices.label: Surge federal police and funding
choices.result: Federal officers fan out and the numbers start to dip within weeks. Safety-first voters cheer; civil-rights groups warn of overreach.

news.headline: President restores order with a real crackdown
Flooding cities with police won't fix root causes
Federal officers deployed as crime fears surge
POTUS SENDS IN THE CAVALRY — streets on LOCKDOWN 🚓

social.text: i can finally walk my dog at night again. thank you.
more cops, fewer rights. we've seen how this movie ends.

choices.advisor: Fast, visible, popular. It also hands your critics a civil-liberties cudgel for years.

choices.label: Fund jobs, housing, and prevention
choices.result: You pour money into community programs and the violence-interruption crews. Advocates beam; skeptics ask why the streets aren't safe yet.

news.headline: President invests in the roots, not just the cuffs
Soft-on-crime spending while cities bleed
White House bets on prevention to curb crime
POTUS skips the SIRENS, opens the WALLET — will it work? 🏘️

social.text: actual prevention instead of a photo-op crackdown. respect.

choices.advisor: The right long-term bet that gives you nothing to point at before the next news cycle.

choices.label: Do a measured bit of both
choices.result: You split the difference with targeted enforcement and new programs. The balanced plan calms the worst critics and thrills no one.

news.headline: President pairs enforcement with prevention dollars
Half a crackdown is still half a surrender
A compromise that risks doing neither well
POTUS tries to PLEASE EVERYONE on crime — bold strategy 🤷

social.text: carrots and sticks. not sexy but probably the realistic move.

choices.advisor: The safe centrist play. It steadies the ship and gives both flanks a reason to grumble.

title: The Pardon on Your Desk
briefing: A high-profile clemency request lands on your desk, and it is radioactive. Supporters call the prisoner a victim of an unjust system; opponents call clemency a slap in the face to the rule of law. Sign it and you make headlines for a week; deny it and you make a different set.

choices.label: Grant the controversial pardon
choices.result: You sign, and the reaction is instant and ferocious. Advocates hail your courage while opponents accuse you of corrupting justice itself.

news.headline: A brave act of mercy that rights a wrong
President spits on the rule of law
President grants high-profile, contested pardon
POTUS FREES controversial figure — capital LOSES IT ✍️💣

social.text: took guts. the system failed them and you finally fixed it.
justice for sale. unbelievable. who's next on the list.

choices.advisor: A principled stand or a self-inflicted wound, depending entirely on who you ask.

choices.label: Deny it and defend the process
choices.result: You decline and let the courts have the final word. Institutionalists nod approvingly; the prisoner's champions vow they won't forget.

news.headline: President respects justice, refuses political pardon
President declines contested clemency request
A chance for mercy, squandered
POTUS says NOPE to mega-pardon — supporters SEETHING 😠

social.text: let the courts work. presidents shouldn't be a get-out-of-jail button.

choices.advisor: Steady and institutional. You'll be the villain to a loud, motivated minority.

choices.label: Commute the sentence, withhold full pardon
choices.result: You shorten the sentence without erasing the conviction. The half-measure earns a shrug from everyone and a clean win from no one.

news.headline: President commutes sentence, stops short of pardon
Partial mercy that pleases no one fully
A clever dodge dressed as a compromise
POTUS SPLITS THE BABY on pardon — internet CONFUSED 🤔

social.text: the most 'technically did something' move possible. classic.

choices.advisor: The threading-the-needle option. Low drama, low credit, and a faint whiff of dodging.

title: The Mandate Question
briefing: A fast-moving outbreak is filling hospitals, and your health team is urging a sweeping public-health mandate before it gets worse. Civil-liberties groups warn that heavy-handed orders will spark a backlash you can't control. The hospitals say they can't wait much longer.

choices.label: Issue a strong national mandate
choices.result: You order sweeping measures and the curve starts to bend. The hospitals exhale; businesses and liberty groups erupt in protest.

news.headline: President puts lives first with decisive action
Overreach that tramples freedom and commerce
President issues sweeping public-health order
POTUS LOCKS IT DOWN — businesses in REVOLT 🦠🔒

social.text: from inside the ICU: thank you. you may have just saved my unit.
and there go our freedoms, one 'emergency' at a time.

choices.advisor: Saves lives and saves the system, at the cost of a roaring liberty backlash.

choices.label: Issue guidance, leave it voluntary
choices.result: You urge caution but mandate nothing. Liberty groups thank you; weeks later the hospitals are still overwhelmed and asking why.

news.headline: President trusts the people over the bureaucrats
Inaction dressed up as freedom, hospitals pay the price
White House opts for guidance, not mandates
POTUS keeps it CHILL on outbreak — doctors PANICKING 😷

social.text: finally a president who treats us like adults. thank you.

choices.advisor: Wins the freedom crowd now and owns every overflowing hospital later.

choices.label: Empower targeted local responses
choices.result: You fund and arm local authorities to act where it's worst. The flexible approach calms tempers and frustrates anyone wanting one clear national answer.

news.headline: President backs localized, targeted health response
A patchwork when the moment called for one voice
Sensible deference to local decision-makers
POTUS lets the LOCALS decide — chaos or genius? 🗺️

social.text: different places, different rules. actually kind of smart?

choices.advisor: Politically nimble and hard to attack. It just means fifty different headlines instead of one.
